exit_codes.name: missing-dependency
exit_codes.description: Required command or package dependency is missing

exit_codes.name: unsupported-platform
exit_codes.description: Command requires a different platform (e.g. macOS vs Linux)

exit_codes.name: destructive-refused
exit_codes.description: Destructive operation was explicitly refused / failed confirmation

exit_codes.name: state-not-found
exit_codes.description: State directory or state file was not found

exit_codes.name: schema-validation-failed
exit_codes.description: JSON schema verification or parse failed

exit_codes.name: network-unavailable
exit_codes.description: Remote package or state metadata unreachable

exit_codes.name: resume-unavailable
exit_codes.description: No resume state found to continue command execution
